acceptance_targets: [chapter_15_F003] PASS if Kline's revised exchange contains at least one contraction and one non-policy, scene-anchored sentence while still enforcing compliance; FAIL if every line remains fully bureaucratic command language.

[chapter_15_F004] PASS if Eli has at most one one-word assent in the revised terms span and at least two replies longer than four words that add pressure-relevant content; FAIL if his acceptance still reads as repeated minimal acknowledgments.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if Kline's revised exchange contains at least one contraction and one non-policy, scene-anchored sentence while still enforcing compliance; FAIL if every line remains fully bureaucratic command language.
findings.problem: Kline's speech stays uniformly policy-formal across all turns, creating stilted over-formality and narrowing her to an institutional mouthpiece rather than a pressured person with register variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Target snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:132, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:134, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:146, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:158, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:306. Preserve authority but introduce one contraction and one concrete, scene-specific line that is not legal/policy boilerplate.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if Eli has at most one one-word assent in the revised terms span and at least two replies longer than four words that add pressure-relevant content; FAIL if his acceptance still reads as repeated minimal acknowledgments.
findings.problem: The Eli-Theo terms sequence leans on repeated one-word assent ("Done/Fair/Okay"), producing transcript cadence and reducing leverage shifts in a high-stakes exchange.
findings.rewrite_direction: Target snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:236, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:240, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:242, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:246, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:250. Keep Theo's boundaries but give Eli at least two substantive responses that show friction, ownership, or negotiation in his own register.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on dialogue realism and voice separation: idiolect fidelity, leverage shifts, pressure cadence, anti-transcript behavior, natural colloquial texture (contractions/interruptions/slang when character-true), and pressure-true profanity usage per aesthetic risk policy.
revision_pass.label: dialogue/idiolect/cadence fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
